_comment: Add one entry per SIP fund. Find your scheme_code by searching https://www.mfapi.in/ or https://api.mfapi.in/mf/search?q=YOUR_FUND_NAME . units_log is a running list of every SIP installment - add a new line each month after your SIP is debited. total_units and total_invested are auto-summed by the app from units_log, you don't need to maintain them by hand.

funds.fund_name: EXAMPLE - Parag Parikh Flexi Cap Fund
